message:
refactor(test): use SqliteStorage API instead of raw rusqlite in future-schema test

Replace direct rusqlite::Connection usage with SqliteStorage::open()
in the future-schema-version test. The test was manually creating the
meta table and inserting a schema_version, but SqliteStorage::open()
already handles schema creation. Now uses storage.raw().execute() to
set the future version, removing the unused rusqlite::Connection import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
